domain.name: dynamic_workflow_engine
domain.description: A data-driven workflow engine (Pega/Appian-class): an intake questionnaire resolves to a Scenario from a library; a generic orchestrator instantiates it and decomposes it into tasks routed to users. N-invariant — the engine loads ONE scenario per instance; the library is data. NO native ODC BPT (can't define processes at runtime); the process is a state machine in data + engine service actions. The engine/UI/loader are FIXED code; scenarios are rows. See ARCHITECTURE.md.

capabilities.name: SubmitIntake
capabilities.note: questionnaire answers -> ResolveScenario (DecisionRow match) -> InstantiateWorkflow (spawn first TaskInstance(s))

capabilities.name: ResolveScenario
capabilities.note: FIXED: indexed decision-table match of intake answers -> Scenario. N-invariant (lookup, not scan).

capabilities.name: AdvanceInstance
capabilities.note: FIXED ENGINE (G1): on task completion, traverse THIS instance's ScenarioSteps + eval TransitionRules -> spawn next TaskInstance(s) (parallel groups), update State, write audit. Loads one scenario; N-invariant.

capabilities.name: CompleteTask
capabilities.note: worker submits a task's OutputData -> CompleteTask -> AdvanceInstance.

capabilities.name: AuthorLibrary
capabilities.note: the client maintains the scenario library (any N) without code.

capabilities.name: EscalateOverdue
capabilities.note: Timer-driven SLA/escalation sweep (the ONLY timer; not per-instance flow).

integrations.name: LibrarySource
integrations.purpose: bulk-load the scenario library (ETL from Appian/Pega/sheets) — G3

_harness_gaps.note: The capabilities flagged engine:true map to a NEW canonical `workflow-engine` recipe (G1) — one fixed implementation parameterized by entity names, NOT per-scenario. The WorkspacePortal's task screen needs a NEW `dynamic-form` recipe (G2) that renders TaskTemplate.FieldDefinition at runtime via a fixed field-type set. The library rows load via a bulk importer (G3, generalize the deterministic-SQL/REST seed). Everything else uses existing recipes. SPIKE the dynamic form UX first.
